opening_geometry: four lotus petals around the passenger cell
a zipper seam drawn by moving gummies
material_change: blue paint ripens into pearly pink lychee rind
sugar frost traces seams before the surface softens
the black upholstery pushes outward and becomes the peel
colored light turns rigid panels into flexible candy skin
the reflected car changes first and the real car follows
the metal becomes a miniature stage-set material
lift_conversion: the opened shell joins into a parasail
the peel catches air like a kite
the petals inhale and become a balloon canopy
the roof becomes two broad wings
the peel forms a hammock carried by the gummy crew
the car drops away while the opened roof remains suspended
visual_register: anime transformation insert inside live action
